case_title: SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY vs. WELLS FARGO BANK et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-02-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-13-1993
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-02-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-02-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-04-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-1993 Sweep; Adjudicated

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-1993 Continued To Oct-04-93 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 04
